title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Titan Eyeplus - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Titan Eyeplus - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
